query: default.filter(((((((nucleotideEquals(position:=300, symbol:='G')) && ((nucleotideEquals(position:=400, symbol:='-')) || (nucleotideEquals(position:=500, symbol:='B')))) && (!(nucleotideEquals(position:=600, symbol:='-')))) && (maybe((nucleotideEquals(position:=700, symbol:='B')) || (nucleotideEquals(position:=800, symbol:='-'))))) && (nOf(3, {nucleotideEquals(position:=123, symbol:='A'), nucleotideEquals(position:=234, symbol:='T'), nucleotideEquals(position:=345, symbol:='G')}))) && (pango_lineage.lineage('B', includeSublineages:=true)))).groupBy({count:=count()})
